summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Dark/Light mode toggle within Minimalist neumorphic theme. All 10 test scenarios PASSED including critical payment modal fix verification.
critical_code_review_comments: ThemeContext.js: neoMode state correctly toggles 'light'/'dark', CSS variables properly set on body.style
theme-minimalist.css: body.theme-minimalist.neo-dark section has proper dark mode overrides for all UI elements
ThemeTab.js: Claro/Oscuro toggle with data-testid='neo-mode-light' and 'neo-mode-dark' working correctly
Login.js: isNeoDark conditional rendering correctly shows dark neumorphic login
Payment keypad: Numbers now clearly visible - white on dark (dark mode) and dark on light (light mode)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme is currently set to 'minimalist' light mode (Claro). Dark/light mode toggle verified working. Payment modal keypad numbers are now visible in both modes. Theme persists through logout/login cycle.

dark_mode_toggle.description: Clicking 'Oscuro' in Settings > Apariencia switches entire app to dark navy neumorphic. Body gets 'neo-dark' class.

light_mode_toggle.description: Clicking 'Claro' switches back to off-white neumorphic. Body loses 'neo-dark' class.

dashboard_dark_mode.description: All text readable (white rgb(255,255,255) on dark navy), cards have neumorphic shadows + LED glow.

login_page_dark_mode.description: Dark navy background (rgb(15,23,42)), 3D buttons, prominent LED glow behind card.

theme_persistence.description: Saved dark mode, logout, login - theme mode persists correctly.

original_theme_unaffected.description: Switching to Tema Original restores full dark glassmorphism without Claro/Oscuro toggle.

payment_modal_fix.description: CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED - Payment keypad numbers clearly visible: Dark mode = white text (rgb(255,255,255)) on dark navy (rgb(15,23,42)); Light mode = dark text (rgb(29,40,58)) on off-white (rgb(240,245,249)).

settings_apariencia_toggle.description: Shows Claro/Oscuro toggle when Minimalist is selected. Toggle buttons have data-testid attributes.

color_pickers_conditional.description: Dark mode shows 'Fondo Oscuro' picker (#0f172a), Light mode shows 'Fondo Claro' picker (#f0f5f9).

tables_page_dark_mode.description: Text readable, table nodes visible with LED glow, area tabs functional.

visual_verification_details.dark_mode_text: rgb(255, 255, 255) white - excellent contrast on dark bg
visual_verification_details.light_mode_text: rgb(29, 40, 58) dark slate - excellent contrast on light bg
